title: Battle-Bond [Cobblemon]
description: Bond with your Pokémon and finally unleash the power that is Ash-Greninja in cobblemon
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee9a1fb09dc76942fc17ad37fd0393f959ab009c.png)
A Cobblemon Addon That adds The Ability Battle bond and Ash-Greninja to cobblemon

---

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b5d56fa3af8899c9f1656c788cbe06054f24870.png)

When you find a wild Greninja, it has a chance of being a special version of greninja that has battle bond, if this is the case when its freindship is increased it can change into an incomplete form of ash greninja 3 times, which will increase its stats a little more each time

once its evolve and deevolved 3 times, you will be able to evolve into the complete form of ash greninja, which can de-evolve and re-evolve into the complete form at any time outside of battle

when greninja is in its complete form it gets the following buffs

- 50+ Attack
- 50+ Special Attack
- 10+ speed

coming to a total of 110+ Base stat total

---

![Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4aa11aa2d556ca9ad5ec09afa920eb9b6036040.png)

just like with any cobblemon Addon, in order to install this you need to locate your resource pack folder, and your worlds datapack folder, then copy paste it or put a download of each into each folder, then apply them in game

---

If you want to support me Check out my other addons

- Errormons (adds missingno)
- Terastalmons (Adds terapagos, and will soon add terastalization)
- Cobbledex (adds the pokedex to the game)
- Ascensions Megamons (Adds mega Evolution to cobblemon)
- Genomons (Adds 40+ new forms, and pokemon to the game to the game)
